match_point_left.text: Match point, Voltari. The storm is about to break.
Voltari's on the brink — one play from the title.
Calculated storms — Voltari eyes match point.

match_point_right.text: Match point, Ember Lynx. Instinct's about to burn.
Ember Lynx one rally away from a championship moment.
The flame closes in — match point for Ember Lynx.

win_left.text: Voltari takes the match! Pure calculation on centre stage.
Game over — Voltari's algorithm wins the day.

win_right.text: Ember Lynx wins! Instinct over calculation tonight.
The flame holds — Ember Lynx closes it out.

long_rally_short.text: Five-hit rally — both agents settling in.

long_rally_mid.text: Ten hits and climbing — this is a slugfest.

long_rally_long.text: They just won't end this rally.

clutch_shield.text: Shield absorbs it at the last moment!

nice_smash.text: Power play — ball drives down hard.
